projectDescription: A SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) flow that synchronizes employee compensation data from SAP S/4HANA to SAP SuccessFactors by reading job records, fetching commission totals, and upserting custom certificate info objects on a scheduled basis.
keyFeatures: Reads active employee job records from SAP SuccessFactors via OData V2 (EmpJob entity)
Fetches commission compensation data from SAP S/4HANA OData service (ZHR_CARTAS_SRV)
XPath-based message splitting to process each employee record individually
Groovy script for XML namespace cleanup and OData response normalization
Upserts custom SuccessFactors object (cust_Info_Certificados) with calculated commission data
Basic authentication with credential aliases for both SAP systems
Content Modifier steps for property extraction and message body construction
publicApiSurface: SuccessFactors OData V2 endpoint: GET /odata/v2/EmpJob ($filter=emplStatus eq '1465')
Groovy function: processData(Message message) — strips OData XML namespaces
